name: Green Chili Salsa Dip (Beware Very Hot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tomatillos are Mexican green tomatoes in husks.
2. Remove the stems and carefully split each pepper; remove the seeds. Wear rubber gloves to avoid burns.
3. Coarsely chop the tomatillos and place them in a bowl.
4. Add all the remaining ingredients to the bowl and mix well.
5. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
Makes about 3 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Corn Tortillas, Potato Skins, Celery, Jicama, Monterey Jack Cheese, Cheddar Cheese
